input_payload.clause_text: Vendor shall indemnify and hold harmless the Client from any and all claims, damages, losses, and expenses arising out of or related to Vendor's performance under this Agreement.

description: Indemnification clause without any liability cap or limitation

input_payload.clause_text: The Receiving Party agrees to hold in confidence all Confidential Information disclosed by the Disclosing Party for a period of three (3) years from the date of disclosure. The Receiving Party shall not use the Confidential Information for any purpose other than evaluating the potential business relationship between the parties.

description: Standard NDA confidentiality clause with reasonable duration and purpose limitation

input_payload.document_text:
SERVICE AGREEMENT

This Agreement is entered into between Acme Corp and Beta LLC.

1. Services: Provider shall deliver consulting services.
2. Payment: Client shall pay $10,000 monthly.
3. Term: This agreement is effective for 12 months.
4. Termination: Either party may terminate with 30 days written notice.

description: Contract document missing governing law and jurisdiction clause

input_payload.clause_text: Either party may terminate this Agreement for convenience upon sixty (60) days' prior written notice to the other party. Upon termination, the Client shall pay for all services rendered through the effective date of termination.

description: Standard termination clause with reasonable notice period and payment obligation

input_payload.clause_text: Provider shall process personal data of Client's customers including names, email addresses, and purchase history to deliver the services described herein. Provider shall store such data on its servers located in the United States.

description: Clause references personal data processing but lacks data protection addendum or privacy safeguards

input_payload.clause_text: The aggregate liability of Provider under this Agreement shall not exceed the total fees paid by Client during the twelve (12) month period preceding the claim. In no event shall Provider be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages.

description: Reasonable liability limitation clause with 12-month fee cap and consequential damages exclusion

input_payload.clause_text: Employee agrees that for a period of thirty-six (36) months following termination of employment, Employee shall not directly or indirectly engage in any business that competes with the Company anywhere in the world.

description: Non-compete clause exceeding 2 years with unreasonable worldwide geographic scope

input_payload.clause_text: This Agreement shall automatically renew for successive one (1) year periods unless either party provides written notice of non-renewal at least ninety (90) days prior to the end of the then-current term.

description: Auto-renewal clause with proper 90-day advance notice requirement

input_payload.document_text:
SUPPLY AGREEMENT

This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of California.

1. Supply Terms: Supplier shall deliver goods as specified.
2. Payment: Net 30 days.
3. Warranty: Goods shall be free from defects for 12 months.
4. Limitation of Liability: Total liability shall not exceed contract value.
5. Governing Law: State of California, USA.

description: Contract document missing force majeure clause — may need review depending on risk tolerance

input_payload.clause_text: Provider may assign this Agreement or any of its rights or obligations hereunder to any third party without the prior written consent of Client.

description: Assignment clause allowing transfer without counterparty consent
